situationalContext: Geordi is in Engineering, watching a sensor log and asking the Computer to analyze audio elements.
userQuery: All right, computer. Analyse audio elements from time index fourteen four seven to fifteen five eight. List all anomalies.

computerReply: No subspace projections present. No z-particle emissions present. No interferometric patterns present.
situationalContext: Geordi is in Engineering, continuing to query the Computer for specific emissions and frequencies.
userQuery: Any subspace projections, z-particle emissions, interferometric frequencies?

situationalContext: Geordi is in Engineering, examining a visual record and asking the Computer about a shadow.
Geordi is in Engineering, asking the Computer to identify the source of a shadow on the screen.
userQuery: Computer, the shadow currently displayed in section B three, what is its source?

computerReply: A simulation would be limited to areas scanned by the visual recording device.
situationalContext: Geordi is in Engineering, asking the Computer if it can compile a holographic simulation from the visual record.
userQuery: Computer, do you have sufficient data to compile a holographic simulation of this visual record?

computerReply: Affirmative. Programme complete. Enter when ready.
situationalContext: Geordi is in the corridor, asking the Computer about the readiness of the Tarchannen simulation.
userQuery: Computer, is the Tarchannen simulation ready?

computerReply: Affirmative, with an increasing probability of error reaching ninety five percent after ten seconds.
situationalContext: Geordi is on the Holodeck, asking the Computer to extrapolate the movements of the officers in the simulation.
userQuery: Computer, based on their speed and direction, can you extrapolate each officer's movements as they walk out of the recording device's field of view?

computerReply: There is no object in the programme which could generate the shadow.
situationalContext: Geordi is on the Holodeck, asking the Computer to identify the source of a shadow using vector analysis.
userQuery: Computer, using vector analysis, identify the source of this shadow.

computerReply: There is insufficient data to reconstruct the requested object.
situationalContext: Geordi is on the Holodeck, asking the Computer to determine the shape and position of an object causing a shadow.
userQuery: Computer, given the distance between the light and the wall, can you determine the most likely shape and position of the object causing this shadow?

computerReply: Commander La Forge is not on board the Enterprise.
situationalContext: Doctor Crusher is in Sickbay, asking the Computer to locate Commander La Forge.
Captain Picard is on the Bridge, asking the Computer for Commander La Forge's last known location.
userQuery: Computer, what was the last known location of Commander La Forge?
